articles.title: Most Haredi young men unemployed, women hit record employment, report shows
articles.description: Employment rate among ultra-Orthodox men of working age has remained exceptionally low for a decade, according to a report by the Labor Ministry. Employment among Haredi women, however has reached a historic high
articles.author: Sivan Klingbail

articles.title: Human in Israel smashed in the face with a rock 100,000 years ago
articles.description: The dual nature of humanity may have emerged much earlier than thought, going by the survival of a person slammed in the jaw in Qafzeh Cave, and some pretty sick children
articles.author: Ruth Schuster

articles.title: The Jewish Olympics reimagined: war, victory and memory
articles.description: From muscular Zionism to postwar trauma, a new exhibition recasts the Maccabiah as a lens on Jewish identity, war and nation-building
articles.author: Naama Riba

articles.title: What is the purpose of a Jewish museum in Europe after October 7?
articles.description: Faced with boycotts, cancellations and rising antisemitism, Jewish museums across Europe are being forced to rethink their role. 'Times are changing, our societies are changing, our audience is changing, and we will have to adapt.'
articles.author: Liam Hoare

articles.title: Israel gov't wrongly cites academia letter to justify curbing free speech on campuses
articles.description: The Council for Higher Education claimed that a proposed directive to limit freedom of protest and expression at universities and colleges was formulated at the request of institution heads. However, the letter obtained by Haaretz shows they were actually urging lawmakers to halt proposed legislation on the matter
articles.author: Noa Limone

articles.title: Israel is failing ex-Haredi youth. Urgent change is needed
articles.description: Israelis who choose to leave the ultra-Orthodox world find themselves struggling with educational gaps and economic distress. Israel must do more to help them integrate into society, for the benefit of the country
articles.author: Adar Anisman

articles.title: Many Israeli LGBTQ teens fear seeking mental and medical healthcare, studies reveal
articles.description: Three new studies recently found that Israeli LGBTQ teens are less likely to seek mental health care due to their fear of being misunderstood or inadequately treated, amid the political and public discourse in Israel. Researchers say only specialized training could close the gap
articles.author: Ido Efrati

articles.title: Israeli LGBTQ teens fear seeking mental and medical treatment, study shows
articles.description: A series of University of Haifa studies found that Israeli LGBTQ teens often avoid pursuing mental and medical treatment in fear of non-accepting healthcare providers, as many professionals cite public and political discourse on the community as harming to their sense of self-security
articles.author: Ido Efrati

articles.title: Were Polish women really joyless? A new book claims that Jews in pre-war Poland actually had a lot of fun
articles.description: According to historian Emma Zohar, the stereotype of sad and grim Polish Jewry was a fabrication of Zionism – and the Nazis. These Jews had controversial beauty contests, vacation plans and – yes, really – good food
articles.author: Ofer Aderet

articles.title: The gift Jews gave to America on its 100th birthday in 1876
articles.description: The poem, 'Minchat Yehudah,' which honored America's centennial, was written in Hebrew by Moses Aaron Schreiber

articles.title: Dumber than a 10 year old: Are Israeli students really that stupid?
